title: 5 things every AI agent harness needs
summary: Google Cloud Tech presents five critical components needed in AI agent harnesses to move from prototype to production. The video emphasizes that the model is only the brain and infrastructure around it determines whether agents ship successfully.
writeup: Google Cloud Tech outlines five components an AI agent harness needs to move from prototype to production. The framing is that the model functions only as the brain, and the surrounding infrastructure determines whether agents actually ship. The takeaway is a focus on production readiness: what to build around a model so agents work reliably beyond a demo.
